query: UPDATE sources SET groupName = 'Gulf' WHERE name IN ('Gulf', 'GULF', 'gulf') AND (groupName IS NULL OR groupName = ''); UPDATE sources SET groupName = 'MEA' WHERE name IN ('MEA', 'mea', 'Mea') AND (groupName IS NULL OR groupName = ''); SELECT id, name, groupName FROM sources ORDER BY name;
